category_title: Disappeared learners with chronic absenteeism and dislike of school
scenario_title: Morning attendance and off-site program engagement
minimal_context: The tutor is calling the student in the morning to wake them up and ensure they take the minibus to their off-site program.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Good morning. I am calling to wake you up and remind you that the minibus will be arriving soon to take you to today's off-site activity.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (yawns) I'm not going. I don't like going to these things.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to attend the program today. Please get out of bed.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't want to. At work experience and college you get treated more of an adult, and at school I was like – I thought I was treated more of a child, so I didn't go.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We expect you to participate. The minibus is on its way.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't care. I'm not getting on the minibus and I'm not going.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Good morning. I am calling to wake you up and remind you that the minibus will be arriving soon to take you to today's off-site activity.

STUDENT: (yawns) I'm not going. I don't like going to these things.

TUTOR: You need to attend the program today. Please get out of bed.

STUDENT: I don't want to. At work experience and college you get treated more of an adult, and at school I was like – I thought I was treated more of a child, so I didn't go.

TUTOR: We expect you to participate. The minibus is on its way.

STUDENT: I don't care. I'm not getting on the minibus and I'm not going.

task.content: To attend an activity and participate on programmes
task.learning_goal: To make a successful transition into post-16 learning and avoid becoming 'not in education, employment or Training'

context.environment: Off-site programmes and the young person in their home
context.social_setting: Part-time out-of-school alternative packages of provision

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: In the morning when expected to attend an activity
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Poor attendance and a greater likelihood to play truant
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Lower aspirations, dislike of school, and motivation issues
related_quotes: At work experience and college you get treated more of an adult, and at school I was like – I thought I was treated more of a child, so I didn’t go.

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Disengaging from mainstream schooling, becoming truants and absentees
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Feeling treated more of a child
related_quotes: At work experience and college you get treated more of an adult, and at school I was like – I thought I was treated more of a child, so I didn’t go.
